news.title: McDonough police search for critically missing 12-year-old
news.summary: McDonough police are asking for the public's help to locate a 12-year-old boy who disappeared from his home.

news.title: Metro Atlanta Walmart briefly evacuated amid bomb threat
news.summary: A large police presence was reported at a Forsyth County Walmart Sunday night.

news.title: 2 arrested after DeKalb woman injured by 'celebratory gunfire'
news.summary: A woman was hospitalized after being struck by a stray bullet from "celebratory gunfire" inside her DeKalb County home Saturday night.

news.title: 1 person arrested after gunfire interrupts fireworks celebration in Avondale Estates, police say
news.summary: Attendees at the celebration were evacuated out of an abundance of caution, according to police, and were quickly escorted from the stadium.

news.title: Man arrested after gunfire disrupts fireworks show; families ran for safety
news.summary: A Fourth of July fireworks celebration in DeKalb County turned chaotic Saturday night after gunshots were fired near the event, sending families running for safety inside Cobb Stadium in Avondale Esta

news.title: Man in custody after allegedly opening fire at a metro Atlanta fireworks show
news.summary: The Avondale Estates Police Department said a man was placed under arrest after allegedly opening fire at Cobb Stadium during a fireworks show.

news.title: Driver dies after flipping car on I-75 ramp during GSP pursuit
news.summary: A high-speed pursuit on Interstate 75 ended in a fatal rollover crash in Henry County early Sunday morning after a driver attempted to flee state law enforcement.

news.title: 2 charged after celebratory gunfire wounds woman in metro Atlanta home, police say
news.summary: Two men were arrested after a woman was hit by celebratory gunfire that came through the home’s wall on July 4.

news.title: 23-year-old dies in Cobb County motorcycle crash
news.summary: A 23-year-old Kennesaw man was killed Saturday afternoon when his motorcycle veered off a Cobb County road and struck a tree.

news.title: Man arrested after gunfire erupts near Avondale Estates fireworks show
news.summary: An Avondale Estates man faces multiple charges after authorities caught him firing gunshots near a local holiday celebration on Saturday night.

news.title: 3 injured after fight sparks gunfire in northwest Atlanta
news.summary: Three people are recovering after an argument escalated into gunfire early Sunday morning in northwest Atlanta, according to police.

news.title: 2 women injured in Atlanta shooting on Piedmont Avenue
news.summary: Two women were hospitalized following a shooting in downtown Atlanta.

news.title: 1 dead, 1 injured in shooting after Gainesville concert
news.summary: A Friday night shooting after a downtown holiday concert in Gainesville left one man dead and another person hospitalized.
